answers: Remote work tips: dedicated workspace, set working hours, overcommunicate, take breaks, and dress for work (mindset matters).
Productivity: use time-blocking, minimize distractions, use pomodoro technique, and keep video on for accountability.
Challenges: isolation, work-life blur, distractions. Solution: schedule social time, set boundaries, and create routine.
Ghore boshe kaj: fixed schedule banao, workspace alag koro, break nao, ar overwork koro na.
